title: China Sees a ‘Giant With a Limp’ as U.S. Drains Weapons on Iran War
summary_full: America’s ability to deter China in a war over Taiwan is weakened, Chinese analysts say, giving Beijing leverage in an upcoming summit with President Trump.
summary_public: America’s ability to deter China in a war over Taiwan is weakened, Chinese analysts say, giving Beijing leverage in an upcoming summit with President Trump.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Drains Weapons on Iran War
